ScenarioDef.label: Orphanage start
ScenarioDef.description:
War rages across the rimworld. Settlements burn and children are left behind. You've decided to build a place of refuge — an orphanage in the wilderness. Every few weeks, more war orphans will find their way to your doors. Can you keep them safe, fed, and sane?
This is a challenging scenario. Orphan events arrive frequently, starting within the first 10 days. You'll need to balance caring for traumatized children with building a colony that can sustain them all.

scenario.summary: Build an orphanage on the rim. War orphans arrive regularly. Keep them alive.

li.text:
The wars on this rimworld have left countless children without homes. You've come here with one purpose: to build a sanctuary for the orphans of war.

It won't be easy. You have few supplies, and the children will start arriving soon. They'll come hungry, injured, and traumatized. But someone has to take care of them.

Build beds. Grow food. Keep them safe. This is your orphanage now.
